productDisplayName: Playboy Women Play It Spicy Perfume
description: Play It Sexy perfume from playboy is an exciting feminine fragrance in a delectable bottle with the bunny ear shaped top with a bow. Opening notes are Bellini cocktail and pink berries with a heart comprising tiger lily, passion flower and heliotrope tones. Base notes are amber, sandalwood and vanilla.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
